content_body: Above the Timberline was everything we hoped for and more!  Luxury appointments everywhere, from the super plush towels and overstuffed pillows to the huge flat screen TVs, we enjoyed every minute.  But as good as the cabin was the wraparound porch was our favorite spot.  Sitting under the covered oudoor fireplace on comfy chairs while being able to grill steak and salmon was nothing less than therapeutic! Can't wait for next year!
title: Luxurious Appointments
